/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/anacapa.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o anacapa  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libanacapa_lib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libOpenImageIO.3.1.11.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libOpenImageIO_Util.3.1.11.dylib _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a
